steps.t: Atta can be found in Hultvís. Ríkmar has told you to speak to a Woodman named Atta, the eldest man in Hultvís, who has refused to leave the settlement…
Atta can be found in Hultvís. You have helped Atta by laying traps in the woods outside Hultvís. You should return to Atta and see if he is more willi…
Atta can be found in Hultvís. You have learned more of Ubb from the children of Hultvís, and you have banished a number of sorrowful spirits in Avabár…
